message:
docs(quic_h3): define forensic log schema v1 for QUIC/H3 E2E scenarios

Schema covers: NDJSON event envelope (6 categories, 24 event types),
scenario manifest with transport/H3 summaries, artifact bundle layout,
15 QUIC/H3 invariant IDs, and replay catalog entry format. Aligned
with existing repro-manifest.v1, trace-event.v1, and NDJSON conventions.

Closes: asupersync-3narc.5.3.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
